text: timeAgoES() used a single template literal for all month counts, producing 'hace 1 meses' (grammatically wrong in Spanish). Any Spanish-language time formatting function must special-case the singular: if count === 1, use the singular noun form (mes, día, semana, hora) before the plural fallback. The threshold between weeks and months is 42 days (diffW >= 6), not 30 days.
